---
name: Design Contribution
about: Submit a 3D garment design to the DripWear collection
title: '[DESIGN] '
labels: design, stellar-wave

---

## Garment Name
Name of your design

## Design Story
Brief description of the inspiration and concept.

## Metadata
- **Garment ID**: `your-design-001`
- **Designer Address**: `GYOUR_STELLAR_ADDRESS...`
- **Edition Size**: [e.g., 100 pieces]
- **Charity Split**: [if applicable]

## Files
- [ ] 3D Model (GLB/OBJ)
- [ ] Preview Image
- [ ] Metadata JSON (following schema)

## Checklist
- [ ] Model is < 50k polygons
- [ ] Textures are PBR-compliant
- [ ] Metadata validates against schema
- [ ] Design is original work

## Additional Notes
Any special features or technical considerations.
